title: pavonia cernua
intro: Pavonia cernua, also known as the common rose-mallow or purple rose-mallow, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The health benefits of Pavonia cernua include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers.
